```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
set.seed(sample.int(.Machine$integer.max, 1))

## Parametros
mu0    <- sample(c(3, 5, 8), 1)
mu1    <- mu0 + sample(c(2, 3, 4), 1)
sigma2 <- sample(c(1, 4, 9), 1)
n      <- sample(c(25, 36, 49, 64), 1)

## Valor critico do teste MP para Normal (unilateral direita, alpha=0.05)
correct <- round(mu0 + 1.645 * sqrt(sigma2) / sqrt(n), 4)
w1 <- round(mu0 + 1.96 * sqrt(sigma2) / sqrt(n), 4)
w2 <- round(mu0 - 1.645 * sqrt(sigma2) / sqrt(n), 4)
w3 <- round((mu0 + mu1) / 2, 4)
w4 <- round(mu1 - 1.645 * sqrt(sigma2) / sqrt(n), 4)

all_vals <- c(correct, w1, w2, w3, w4)
# Garante cinco alternativas numericamente distintas após a parametrização.
integer_choices <- all(abs(all_vals - round(all_vals)) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps))
choice_step <- if (integer_choices) 1 else max(1e-4, max(abs(all_vals), na.rm = TRUE) * 0.01)
while (anyDuplicated(all_vals)) {
  duplicate_position <- which(duplicated(all_vals))[1]
  all_vals[duplicate_position] <- max(all_vals, na.rm = TRUE) + choice_step
}
choices <- sample(all_vals)
sol_pos <- which(choices == correct)
sol_str <- paste(as.integer(seq_along(choices) == sol_pos), collapse = "")
```

Question
========
Para $X_i \overset{\text{iid}}{\sim} N(\mu,`r sigma2`)$ com $\sigma^2 = `r sigma2`$ conhecido, testando $H_0:\mu = `r mu0`$ vs. $H_1:\mu = `r mu1`$ com $\alpha = 0{,}05$. Pelo Lema de NP, a regiao critica e $\bar{X} > k$. O valor critico $k = \mu_0 + z_{0{,}95}\,\sigma/\sqrt{n}$ e:

Answerlist
----------
* `r choices[1]`
* `r choices[2]`
* `r choices[3]`
* `r choices[4]`
* `r choices[5]`

Solution
========
$k = `r mu0` + 1{,}645 \times \sqrt{`r sigma2`}/\sqrt{`r n`} = `r mu0` + 1{,}645 \times `r round(sqrt(sigma2),4)`/`r round(sqrt(n),4)` = `r correct`$.

Erros comuns: usar $z_{0{,}975}=1{,}96$ ($\alpha=0{,}025$); sinal negativo (teste unilateral esquerdo); usar o ponto medio entre $\mu_0$ e $\mu_1$; subtrair de $\mu_1$.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap6S2Q3_NP_normal_valor_critico
extype: schoice
exsolution: `r sol_str`
exshuffle: FALSE
